changelog: Restore + Security fixes (v4.9.11): notice-board.js TYPE_CFG lookup hardened with Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty (prototype pollution prevention); visitor-form.html session-store.js added; supabase-sync.js student restore recalculates paid/due from full ledger; vercel.json Content-Security-Policy HTTP header updated; manifest.json icon entries deduplicated (any+maskable combined) and narrow screenshot added; AUDIT.md changelog table structure fixed; jsconfig.json excludes types.js and js/lib explicitly; rotated leaked VAPID private key; added send-push Edge Function + subscriptions; pattern-lock stores credentials as salted SHA-256 hashes instead of plaintext.
